notes: Voting system: National Producer votes (70%) + SEKAI Producer votes (30%). A separate 'Global Ranker' track exists with inverted weights (30%/70%). Ranks 1-50 reflect the Episode 8 (2nd ranking ceremony) announced positions, where 50 trainees advanced to the next stage. Trainees ranked 51+ (no longer on stage / eliminated by Episode 5 cut) are listed with rank: null. The show is still on air; debut lineup is undetermined.
